text:
龍族……だけじゃないな。
ダーカーの反応……隠れている？

……なんにせよ、まずは龍族を
撃退して落ち着かせねばなるまい。

Draconians... but that's not all. I'm getting
Falspawn readings as well.
They seem to be hiding.

At any rate, we need to drive
back the Draconians and get
them to calm down.
